props.ChoiceText: What you said in one hall began to echo elsewhere as accepted teaching, whether or not you had intended such reach.
props.ChoiceBio: When your voice carried doctrine, belief and reputation became difficult to separate.

0.TransitionText: Because your voice carrying doctrine taught you how belief and reputation can become difficult to separate, church office remained your daily craft.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Prelate, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TargetText: A scholar, preacher, or rival still answers your name with an argument or an admiration.

2.TransitionText: Because your voice carrying doctrine taught you how belief and reputation can become difficult to separate, church office remained your daily craft.

0.TargetText: A younger divine repeats your words as though they were inherited truth.

2.TargetText: Someone now treats your theological favor as a form of promotion.
